privileged_info_summary: The task uses MedinTux v2.16.012 with a synthetic DrTuxTest database containing 20 injected test patients with real-world French addresses. Three randomly selected patients from this population are designated to receive the 'NPAI - ' (N'habite Plus à l'Adresse Indiquée: no longer lives at indicated address) prefix, a standard French postal notation for returned mail. The metadata claims the required prefix is 'NPAI - ' with space and dash, but the verification logic accepts any string beginning with 'NPAI', making the requirement lenient.
